title: Integrations

scriptDescription: In order to start tracking how your customers are interacting with your site, you must first implement the scripts below on your site.

shopify.title: Shopify
shopify.connectionFail: Can not connect with Shopify, please verify all the details are correct.
shopify.insertToken: Insert the one-time API token you received when creating the application
shopify.insertAPIKey: Insert the API key you received after creating the application
shopify.apiVersionDesc: Check your Webhook version in "Configuration" tab
shopify.scriptDescription: Enter the management interface in Shopify, click on "Online Store", then on "Themes" and click on "Edit Code"
shopify.scriptDescription2: Enter "Liquid Theme", embed the script between <script> and <head> tags and click save:
shopify.scriptDescription3: After implementing the script in the header, the following parameters must be reported using a Javascript function
shopify.scriptDescription4: Return to the menu and go to the "Settings" menu and within it to "Checkout"
shopify.scriptDescription5: Go down to the "Order Status Page", paste the script attached here and click Save:
shopify.scriptDescription6: After implementing this script, campaign reports will show the revenue from each campaign.
